description_long: This object is a highly ornate, antique-style book with a thick, weathered cover adorned with intricate gold embellishments and corner protectors. The cover features a raised, sculpted central medallion with swirling patterns and what appears to be a gemstone or enamel inlay. Four large, gold-plated corner pieces and a prominent gold clasp secure the book shut, adding to its sense of value and protection. The spine and edges are reinforced with decorative metal bands, and the pages are visibly aged, with a slightly yellowed appearance. Several blue, patterned silk ribbons serve as bookmarks, protruding from the sides and bottom. The overall craftsmanship and lavish decoration suggest this is a ceremonial or display piece, possibly used for special occasions or as a symbol of status.
description: An ornate, gold-embellished antique book with sculpted details, gemstone inlay, and blue silk bookmarks. The cover and spine are reinforced with decorative metalwork, giving it a ceremonial and luxurious appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thick, aged pages and a blue silk bookmark hanging from the bottom. The gold corner pieces and central medallion are visible, with intricate patterns on the cover.
description_view_1: This view shows the book from the front, emphasizing the large gold clasp that secures it shut and the detailed central medallion. Two blue silk bookmarks are visible, one protruding from the side.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the book is shown, with the gold corner protectors and the sculpted cover medallion in clear view. A single blue silk bookmark hangs from the bottom.
description_view_3: The back of the book is visible, displaying the decorative metal bands along the spine and the richly textured, reddish-brown cover. Blue silk bookmarks protrude from both sides.
